podcast_config.name: Claracle
podcast_config.ai_voice_disclosure: Both hosts on this show are AI-generated synthetic voices, not human presenters.

hosts.name: Theo
hosts.style: Bright and energetic. Leads with enthusiasm, connects themes with forward momentum. Presents signal picks with clarity and genuine curiosity.

hosts.name: Vera
hosts.style: Calm, dry, and measured. Pressure-tests claims with specificity. Challenges hype with evidence, not dismissiveness. Lets pauses land.

opening_cues.cold_open: One provocative stat or question from this week's data. Grab attention in under 30 seconds.
opening_cues.ai_disclosure: Must appear in the first 60 seconds: explicitly state this episode uses AI-generated voice narration.
opening_cues.suggested_phrasing: This episode of Signal Check uses AI-generated voice narration from SquadScope's weekly analysis. Our hosts are synthetic — the data is real.

closing_cues.corrections_path: If we got something wrong, file an issue at https://github.com/jmservera/SquadScope/issues
closing_cues.ai_disclosure_repeat: Repeat AI voice disclosure in the outro.
closing_cues.source_article_link: Direct listeners to the full source article URL.

episode_style.tone: Conversational, not performative. Opinionated, not reckless. Concise, not rushed. Funny, not cruel. Accessible, not dumbed-down.
episode_style.phrasing: Active voice, concrete verbs. Lead with the insight, not the setup. Skeptic challenges must be specific and data-backed. Sometimes they ask questions between them.
episode_style.distinctiveness: Must not replicate or closely resemble any named podcast's style, segment labels, or trademarked phrasing.

intro.description: Full volume for 10 seconds, fade down under Host A's opening line, fade up briefly after Host A finishes, fade out before Host B begins.

outro.description: Start at 1:15 of the song. Slow fade-up during the farewell exchange between hosts, then play to the end of the track.
